title: AI companies should release environmental impact, commit to clean energy, says UN chief
description: United Nations Secretary-General António Guterres is calling on artificial intelligence companies to release information about the carbon, water and land used to power their systems. Guterres spoke Tuesday during an address at London Climate Action Week. He proposed the AI Environmental Transparency Initiative and said AI companies should measure and disclose the environmental impact of their increasingly in-demand technology — impact which has been cited by proponents as reasons to curb the rapid growth of data centers. These companies have faced mounting pressure for increased transparency and more standardized reporting across the industry.
content:
United Nations Secretary-General António Guterres on Tuesday called on artificial intelligence companies to release information about the carbon pollution they create, along with the water and land used to power their operations.
While urging action ... [1481 chars]
